local wezterm = require 'wezterm'


-- 宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンクテーマ
local scheme = wezterm.get_builtin_color_schemes()['Gruvbox Light']

config = {
  background = {
    {
	source = { File = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/work/letusfly85/dotfiles/mars.png" },
        attachment = "Fixed", -- 画像を固定位置に配置（ウィンドウサイズに応じて見える範囲が変わる）
        opacity = 0.55, -- 透明度
        vertical_align = "Middle", -- 垂直方向の画像位置
        horizontal_align = "Center", -- 水平方向の画像位置
        horizontal_offset = "0px", -- 水平方向のオフセット
        repeat_x = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をx方向に繰り返すか
        repeat_y = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をy方向に繰り返すか
        height = "100%" -- 高さだけ指定してアスペクト比を維持（球体が歪まない）
    },
    {
      source = {
       Gradient = {
         colors = { "#000814", "#000a14" }, -- 黒めで少しだけ青み
         orientation = {
           Linear = { angle = -50.0 }, -- グラデーションの方向と角度
         },
       },
     },
     opacity = 0.45, -- 黒めのオーバーレイ
     width = "100%", -- 幅
     height = "100%" -- 高さ
    }
  },
  color_schemes = {
    -- Override the builtin Gruvbox Light scheme with our modification.
    ['Gruvbox Light'] = scheme,

    -- We can also give it a different name if we don't want to override
    -- the default
    ['Gruvbox Red'] = scheme,
  },
  -- カスタムカラースキームを定義
  colors = {
    foreground = "#E6D5B8",
    background = "#0A0A0A",
    
    cursor_bg = "#FFD700",
    cursor_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    cursor_border = "#FF6600",
    
    selection_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    selection_bg = "#00FFFF",
    
    -- ANSIカラー（宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンク）
    ansi = {
      "#0A0A0A", -- 黒（深宇宙）
      "#B8460E", -- 赤（暗い火星の赤）
      "#6B8E23", -- 緑（暗いファンタジーの自然）
      "#DAA520", -- 黄色（暗いゴールド）
      "#2E4BC6", -- 青（暗いサイバーブルー）
      "#7A4FBF", -- マゼンタ（暗いネオンパープル）
      "#008B8B", -- シアン（暗いサイバーシアン）
      "#C0A080", -- 白（暗い砂色）
    },
    brights = {
      "#8B4513", -- 明るい黒（赤茶色）
      "#FF6600", -- 明るい赤（エレクトリックオレンジ）
      "#ADFF2F", -- 明るい緑（ネオングリーン）
      "#FFFF00", -- 明るい黄色（ネオンイエロー）
      "#00BFFF", -- 明るい青（ディープスカイブルー）
      "#DA70D6", -- 明るいマゼンタ（オーキッド）
      "#00FFFF", -- 明るいシアン（アクア）
      "#FFFAF0", -- 明るい白（フローラルホワイト）
    },
  },

  font_size = 20.0,
  use_ime = true,
  window_background_opacity = 0.70,
  macos_window_background_blur = 40,

  window_background_gradient = {
    colors = { "#000000", "#0A0A0A", "#1A0F0A", "#2D1B0E", "#4A2C1A" },  
    orientation = "Vertical",
    blend = "LinearRgb",
  },
  -- window_background_gradient = {
  --  colors = { "#1b1b25" },
  -- },

  window_decorations = "RESIZE",
  show_tabs_in_tab_bar = true,
  hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true,
  window_frame = {
    inactive_titlebar_bg = "none",
    active_titlebar_bg = "none",
  },
  show_new_tab_button_in_tab_bar = false,
  -- show_close_tab_button_in_tabs = false,
  colors = {
      tab_bar = {
      inactive_tab_edge = "none"
    }
  },
  font = wezterm.font('Cica', { weight = 'DemiBold' })
}

-- タブの左側の装飾
local SOLID_LEFT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_lower_right_triangle
-- タブの右側の装飾
local SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_upper_left_triangle

wezterm.on("format-tab-title", function(tab, tabs, panes, config, hover, max_width)
  local background = "#2D1B0E" -- 暗い火星の土壌
  local foreground = "#C0A080"
  local edge_background = "none"
  if tab.is_active then
    background = "#4A2C1A" -- 暗い火星表面
    foreground = "#00FFFF" -- サイバーシアン（明るく保持）
  end
  local edge_foreground = background
  local title = "   " .. wezterm.truncate_right(tab.active_pane.title, max_width - 1) .. "   "
  return {
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_LEFT_ARROW },
    { Background = { Color = background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = foreground } },
    { Text = title },
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW },
  }
end)

wezterm.on('bell', function(window, pane)
  window:toast_notification('Claude Code', 'Task completed', nil, 4000)
end)

return config

I found several relevant results about WezTerm mouse scroll configuration. Here are the key findings:

## Mouse Scroll Speed Configuration

You can configure mouse scroll speed using `mouse_bindings` with `act.ScrollByLine()` to specify how many lines to scroll per wheel event. For example, you can scroll by 3 or more lines at once instead of the default behavior.

## Alternate Buffer Wheel Scroll Speed

The `alternate_buffer_wheel_scroll_speed` setting specifies how many arrow key presses are generated by a single scroll wheel "tick", with a default value of 3. This applies to full-screen programs like pagers and editors.

## Jerky/Stuttering Scroll Issues

Some users have reported lag when scrolling with a touchpad, where the scroll position tries to find the line where to stop, and have suggested a "smooth_scrolling" option to eliminate this lag until the speed reaches zero.

## Mouse Binding Configuration

You can access the actual delta scroll value while handling scroll events using `window:current_event`, which allows for more precise scroll control.

If you're experiencing jerky scrolling, adjusting the `mouse_bindings` configuration with different `ScrollByLine` values or exploring `alternate_buffer_wheel_scroll_speed` may help improve the smoothness depending on your specific use case.

content.content:
# Smooth Scrolling in WezTerm: Solutions and Workarounds

Based on the GitHub issue discussion, there are **no current solutions or configuration options** built into WezTerm for smooth scrolling.

## Key Findings:

**Current Status:**
The maintainer explicitly stated that smooth scrolling is not planned for WezTerm, citing that "a terminal is a fixed grid of character cells" and pixel-level scrolling would add unnecessary complexity to the rendering machinery.

**Suggested Alternatives:**

1. **Use Other Terminal Emulators** - Several alternatives support smooth scrolling:
   - GNOME Terminal (VTE-based)
   - Sakura (VTE-based)
   - Alacritty

2. **Use Neovide** - One commenter recommended trying Neovide, a GUI frontend for Neovim, which features impressive smooth scrolling capabilities.

3. **Accept Current Behavior** - WezTerm's line-by-line scrolling remains the design choice, though many users have expressed strong interest in changing this.

## Community Perspective:

Users emphasized that smooth scrolling provides significant UX benefits including better visual context awareness and improved accessibility for users with reading disorders like dyslexia. However, the project maintainers have not indicated plans to implement this feature.

content.content:
# Mouse Scroll Configuration in WezTerm

Based on the documentation provided, here are the available mouse scroll options:

## Default Scroll Behavior

The default configuration includes mouse wheel scrolling that responds to `WheelUp` and `WheelDown` events. Notably, "mouse wheel scrolling only applies when `alt_screen=false`, as the mouse wheel is typically mapped to arrow keys by the terminal in alt screen mode."

## Configuration Methods

**1. Custom Mouse Bindings**
You can create custom scroll bindings using `mouse_bindings`. For example:

```lua
{
  event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelUp = 1 } } },
  mods = 'CTRL',
  action = act.IncreaseFontSize,
}
```

**2. Related Configuration Options**

- `disable_default_mouse_bindings` - Set to `true` to disable all default assignments and define custom ones
- `bypass_mouse_reporting_modifiers` - Specify alternative modifier keys for bypassing mouse reporting
- `alternate_buffer_wheel_scroll_speed` - Controls scroll speed in alternate buffer mode
- `mouse_wheel_scrolls_tabs` - Enables mouse wheel tab navigation

The documentation references `ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta`, `ScrollByLine`, and `ScrollByPage` as available scroll actions within the KeyAssignment reference.

content.content:
# alternate_buffer_wheel_scroll_speed

**Default value:** `3`

**Function:** This configuration option controls how many arrow key presses are generated when scrolling the mouse wheel in alternate screen buffer mode (used by full-screen terminal applications like pagers and editors).

According to the documentation: "The `alternate_buffer_wheel_scroll_speed` specifies how many arrow key presses are generated by a single scroll wheel 'tick'." With the default value of 3, a single upward wheel scroll will send three arrow-up key events to the application.

This setting only applies when the application hasn't enabled mouse reporting. Prior to this option's introduction, the effective value was always 1.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about WezTerm's mouse scroll handling:

## ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta vs ScrollByLine

ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta adjusts the scroll position by the number of lines in the vertical mouse wheel delta field of the current mouse event, provided that it is a vertical mouse wheel event. This is actually the default mouse binding, so there's not much point adding it to your config unless you also have set disable_default_mouse_bindings to true.

# ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta

## Overview
`ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta` is a WezTerm key assignment action that "adjusts the scroll position by the number of lines in the vertical mouse wheel delta field of the current mouse event, provided that it is a vertical mouse wheel event."

## Introduction
This functionality was introduced in **version 20220807-113146-c2fee766** of WezTerm.

## Behavior
The action responds to mouse wheel events and automatically scrolls the terminal viewport based on the wheel delta values. It works with both `WheelUp` and `WheelDown` button events, making it useful for intuitive mouse-based scrolling through terminal content.

## Default Configuration
This action is part of WezTerm's default mouse bindings, so you typically only need to configure it if you've disabled default mouse bindings using the `disable_default_mouse_bindings` configuration option.

content.content:
# Controlling Mouse Wheel Scroll Speed in WezTerm

The primary solution is to customize mouse bindings in your WezTerm configuration file. You can configure the scroll behavior by modifying `config.mouse_bindings` to use different scroll actions.

## Recommended Configuration

The most effective approach uses `ScrollByLine` with custom values:

```lua
local act = wezterm.action

config.mouse_bindings = {
  {
    event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelUp = 1 } } },
    mods = 'NONE',
    action = act.ScrollByLine(-3),
    alt_screen = false,
  },
  {
    event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelDown = 1 } } },
    mods = 'NONE',
    action = act.ScrollByLine(3),
    alt_screen = false,
  },
}
```

## Key Details

- Adjust the number (3 in the example) to control scroll speed—lower values scroll less per wheel event
- The `alt_screen = false` parameter prevents breaking scrolling in applications like Vim
- Alternative actions include `ScrollByPage` for page-based scrolling with fractional values like `0.2`
- These bindings override default behavior, so customize the values to match your preferred experience

Based on the search results, here's information about wezterm configuration settings for performance on macOS:

## Configuration Settings

**max_fps**: Limits the maximum number of frames per second that wezterm will attempt to draw. WezTerm was capped at 60FPS by default, but setting it to 120FPS improved responsiveness.

**animation_fps**: This setting controls the maximum frame rate used when rendering easing effects for blinking cursors, blinking text and visual bell, with larger values resulting in smoother easing effects but increasing GPU utilization.

**scrollback_lines**: This configuration option controls the size of the scrollback buffer. There is now an upper bound of 999,999,999 for scrollback_lines.

## Performance Considerations on macOS

When rendering a line, BIDI and font shaping are computed and cached, but if you are scrolling rapidly through the scrollback you will likely blow those caches and experience the worst case performance.

Using front_end = "WebGpu" will more directly use Metal than the OpenGL → Metal translation used on M1 machines, potentially yielding more fps.

content.text:
調査完了しました。WezTerm のマウスホイールスクロールのガクガク問題は、以下の要因と対策があります。

**原因:**
- デフォルトの `ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta` は macOS のトラックパッド/マウスホイールのデルタ値をそのまま使うため、値が不安定でガクガクしやすい
- `max_fps` がデフォルト 60 で描画が追いつかないケースがある
- 背景画像 + グラデーションオーバーレイの再描画コストも影響しうる

**対策:**
1. `mouse_bindings` で `ScrollByLine` を使い、1回のスクロールで固定行数スクロールさせる
2. `max_fps` を上げる（120）
3. `scrollback_lines` を明示的に設定
4. WebGPU フロントエンドを使い macOS Metal を直接利用

ブランチを切って PR を作成します。

local wezterm = require 'wezterm'


-- 宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンクテーマ
local scheme = wezterm.get_builtin_color_schemes()['Gruvbox Light']

local act = wezterm.action

config = {
  background = {
    {
	source = { File = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/work/letusfly85/dotfiles/mars.png" },
        attachment = "Fixed", -- 画像を固定位置に配置（ウィンドウサイズに応じて見える範囲が変わる）
        opacity = 0.55, -- 透明度
        vertical_align = "Middle", -- 垂直方向の画像位置
        horizontal_align = "Center", -- 水平方向の画像位置
        horizontal_offset = "0px", -- 水平方向のオフセット
        repeat_x = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をx方向に繰り返すか
        repeat_y = "NoRepeat", -- 画像をy方向に繰り返すか
        height = "100%" -- 高さだけ指定してアスペクト比を維持（球体が歪まない）
    },
    {
      source = {
       Gradient = {
         colors = { "#000814", "#000a14" }, -- 黒めで少しだけ青み
         orientation = {
           Linear = { angle = -50.0 }, -- グラデーションの方向と角度
         },
       },
     },
     opacity = 0.45, -- 黒めのオーバーレイ
     width = "100%", -- 幅
     height = "100%" -- 高さ
    }
  },
  color_schemes = {
    -- Override the builtin Gruvbox Light scheme with our modification.
    ['Gruvbox Light'] = scheme,

    -- We can also give it a different name if we don't want to override
    -- the default
    ['Gruvbox Red'] = scheme,
  },
  -- カスタムカラースキームを定義
  colors = {
    foreground = "#E6D5B8",
    background = "#0A0A0A",
    
    cursor_bg = "#FFD700",
    cursor_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    cursor_border = "#FF6600",
    
    selection_fg = "#0A0A0A",
    selection_bg = "#00FFFF",
    
    -- ANSIカラー（宇宙火星風ファンタジーサイバーパンク）
    ansi = {
      "#0A0A0A", -- 黒（深宇宙）
      "#B8460E", -- 赤（暗い火星の赤）
      "#6B8E23", -- 緑（暗いファンタジーの自然）
      "#DAA520", -- 黄色（暗いゴールド）
      "#2E4BC6", -- 青（暗いサイバーブルー）
      "#7A4FBF", -- マゼンタ（暗いネオンパープル）
      "#008B8B", -- シアン（暗いサイバーシアン）
      "#C0A080", -- 白（暗い砂色）
    },
    brights = {
      "#8B4513", -- 明るい黒（赤茶色）
      "#FF6600", -- 明るい赤（エレクトリックオレンジ）
      "#ADFF2F", -- 明るい緑（ネオングリーン）
      "#FFFF00", -- 明るい黄色（ネオンイエロー）
      "#00BFFF", -- 明るい青（ディープスカイブルー）
      "#DA70D6", -- 明るいマゼンタ（オーキッド）
      "#00FFFF", -- 明るいシアン（アクア）
      "#FFFAF0", -- 明るい白（フローラルホワイト）
    },
  },

  font_size = 20.0,
  use_ime = true,
  window_background_opacity = 0.70,
  macos_window_background_blur = 40,

  window_background_gradient = {
    colors = { "#000000", "#0A0A0A", "#1A0F0A", "#2D1B0E", "#4A2C1A" },  
    orientation = "Vertical",
    blend = "LinearRgb",
  },
  -- window_background_gradient = {
  --  colors = { "#1b1b25" },
  -- },

  window_decorations = "RESIZE",
  show_tabs_in_tab_bar = true,
  hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true,
  window_frame = {
    inactive_titlebar_bg = "none",
    active_titlebar_bg = "none",
  },
  show_new_tab_button_in_tab_bar = false,
  -- show_close_tab_button_in_tabs = false,
  colors = {
      tab_bar = {
      inactive_tab_edge = "none"
    }
  },
  font = wezterm.font('Cica', { weight = 'DemiBold' }),

  -- スクロール性能の改善
  max_fps = 120,
  front_end = "WebGpu",
  scrollback_lines = 10000,

  -- マウスホイールスクロールを固定行数にしてガクガクを防止
  mouse_bindings = {
    {
      event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelUp = 1 } } },
      mods = 'NONE',
      action = act.ScrollByLine(-3),
      alt_screen = false,
    },
    {
      event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelDown = 1 } } },
      mods = 'NONE',
      action = act.ScrollByLine(3),
      alt_screen = false,
    },
  },
}

-- タブの左側の装飾
local SOLID_LEFT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_lower_right_triangle
-- タブの右側の装飾
local SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW = wezterm.nerdfonts.ple_upper_left_triangle

wezterm.on("format-tab-title", function(tab, tabs, panes, config, hover, max_width)
  local background = "#2D1B0E" -- 暗い火星の土壌
  local foreground = "#C0A080"
  local edge_background = "none"
  if tab.is_active then
    background = "#4A2C1A" -- 暗い火星表面
    foreground = "#00FFFF" -- サイバーシアン（明るく保持）
  end
  local edge_foreground = background
  local title = "   " .. wezterm.truncate_right(tab.active_pane.title, max_width - 1) .. "   "
  return {
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_LEFT_ARROW },
    { Background = { Color = background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = foreground } },
    { Text = title },
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW },
  }
end)

wezterm.on('bell', function(window, pane)
  window:toast_notification('Claude Code', 'Task completed', nil, 4000)
end)

return config

content.text:
PR を作成しました: https://github.com/letusfly85/dotfiles/pull/39

## 変更のポイント

**主な改善点は4つです:**

1. **`mouse_bindings` で `ScrollByLine(-3/3)` を指定** - これが一番効果的です。デフォルトの `ScrollByCurrentEventWheelDelta` は macOS のマウスホイールデルタ値をそのまま使うため値が不安定でガクガクの原因になります。固定行数スクロールに変更することで安定します。

2. **`max_fps = 120`** - デフォルト 60fps から引き上げ、描画の追従性を改善

3. **`front_end = "WebGpu"`** - macOS の Metal を直接利用（デフォルトは OpenGL → Metal 変換で遅い）

4. **`scrollback_lines = 10000`** - 明示的にスクロールバックバッファを設定

**注意:** もしスクロール速度が速すぎる/遅すぎると感じたら、`ScrollByLine` の数値（現在 3）を調整してください。1 にすると遅く、5 にすると速くなります。

Sources:
- [WezTerm Mouse Binding docs](https://wezterm.org/config/mouse.html)
- [Scroll speed discussion #4947](https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/discussions/4947)
- [Smooth Scrolling issue #3812](https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/issues/3812)
- [max_fps docs](https://wezterm.org/config/lua/config/max_fps.html)

Based on the search results, here's the information about WezTerm's scrollbar configuration:

## Basic Configuration

To enable the scrollbar in WezTerm, which is currently disabled by default, you use the `enable_scroll_bar` setting. Here's how to configure it:

In your `wezterm.lua` configuration file:
```lua
config.enable_scroll_bar = true
```

You can also enable it via command line:
```bash
wezterm --config enable_scroll_bar=true
```

## Scrollbar Behavior

The scrollbar will occupy the right window padding space. If right padding is set to 0 then it will be increased to a single cell width.

If `enable_scroll_bar` is true, then the value you set for right padding will control the width of the scrollbar.

## Additional Related Settings

- **`min_scroll_bar_height`**: Controls the minimum size of the scroll bar "thumb" and can be specified in pixels (px), points (pt), cells, or percentages (%).

- **Window Padding**: You can customize the scrollbar width and appearance through window padding settings in your configuration.

wezterm.on("format-tab-title", function(tab, tabs, panes, config, hover, max_width)
  local background = "#2D1B0E" -- 暗い火星の土壌
  local foreground = "#C0A080"
  local edge_background = "none"
  if tab.is_active then
    background = "#4A2C1A" -- 暗い火星表面
    foreground = "#00FFFF" -- サイバーシアン（明るく保持）
  end
  local edge_foreground = background
  local title = "   " .. wezterm.truncate_right(tab.active_pane.title, max_width - 1) .. "   "
  return {
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_LEFT_ARROW },
    { Background = { Color = background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = foreground } },
    { Text = title },
    { Background = { Color = edge_background } },
    { Foreground = { Color = edge_foreground } },
    { Text = SOLID_RIGHT_ARROW },
  }
end)

wezterm.on('bell', function(window, pane)
  window:toast_notification('Claude Code', 'Task completed', nil, 4000)
end)

return config

content.text:
PR に追加しました。`enable_scroll_bar = true` を追加しています。

WezTerm を再起動すると右側にスクロールバーが表示されるはずです。スクロールバーは右側の window padding 領域に表示され、ドラッグでスクロール位置を移動することもできます。

もしスクロールバーの幅を調整したい場合は `window_padding` の `right` 値で制御できます。見た目が気に入らない場合はお知らせください。

Sources:
- [enable_scroll_bar docs](https://wezterm.org/config/lua/config/enable_scroll_bar.html)
- [min_scroll_bar_height docs](https://wezterm.org/config/lua/config/min_scroll_bar_height.html)
